name: ev4-decision-kernel

scripts.test:recovery-ledger-lifecycle:
bash -o pipefail -c 'set +e; temp_root="${RUNNER_TEMP:-${TMPDIR:-/tmp}}"; report="$temp_root/krec-001-recovery-ledger-lifecycle.log"; mkdir -p "$temp_root"; : > "$report"; failed=0; run_case() { name="$1"; log="$2"; shift 2; printf "
=== RECOVERY_DIAGNOSTIC %s ===
" "$name" | tee -a "$report"; "$@" > "$log" 2>&1; status=$?; printf "STATUS %s %s
" "$name" "$status" | tee -a "$report"; tail -n 240 "$log" | tee -a "$report"; if [ "$status" -ne 0 ]; then failed=1; fi; }; run_case ledger "$temp_root/recovery-ledger.log" node tools/test-recovery-ledger-lifecycle.mjs; run_case intrinsics "$temp_root/recovery-intrinsics.log" node tools/test-recovery-completion-intrinsics.mjs; run_case transitive "$temp_root/recovery-transitive.log" node --import ./tools/lib/recovery-completion-test-bootstrap.mjs tools/test-recovery-completion-transitive-intrinsics.mjs; run_case node-security "$temp_root/recovery-node-security.log" node --import ./tools/lib/recovery-completion-test-bootstrap.mjs tools/test-recovery-completion-node-transport-and-hash.mjs; run_case readable "$temp_root/recovery-readable.log" node --import ./tools/lib/recovery-completion-test-bootstrap.mjs tools/test-recovery-completion-readable-dependencies.mjs; run_case isolation "$temp_root/recovery-isolation.log" node --import ./tools/lib/recovery-completion-test-bootstrap.mjs tools/test-recovery-completion-isolation-boundary.mjs; run_case fixture-rejection "$temp_root/recovery-fixture-rejection.log" node tools/test-recovery-completion-production-fixture-rejection.mjs; exit "$failed"'
scripts.validate:mvk:core: node kernel/validator/validate-mvk.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-record-v2.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-source-cards.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-consumption-boundaries.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-evidence-workspace.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-elementor-doc-coverage.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-governance-foundation.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-contract.mjs && node kernel/resolver-mvp/resolve-high-risk-p0.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-fixture-triplets.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-l2-decision-correctness.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-kroad-009-vertical-slice.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-contract.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-canonical-lock.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-lineage.mjs
scripts.validate:mvk: node kernel/validator/validate-mvk.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-record-v2.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-source-cards.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-consumption-boundaries.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-evidence-workspace.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-elementor-doc-coverage.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-governance-foundation.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-contract.mjs && node kernel/resolver-mvp/resolve-high-risk-p0.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-fixture-triplets.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-l2-decision-correctness.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-kroad-009-vertical-slice.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-contract.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-canonical-lock.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-lineage.mjs && npm run validate:aigov && npm run test:aigov-v3-exception && npm run test:aigov-v4-hardening && npm run validate:recovery-program && npm run test:recovery-lifecycle && npm run validate:recovery-ledger && npm run test:recovery-ledger-lifecycle && npm run validate:roadmap-memory && npm run test:coverage-impact-governance && npm run validate:coverage

description: Kernel-local MVK with owner-policy exact-main AIGOV closure and active dependency-aware Recovery Program.
